programme.title: 🌊 1.9m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 1.7m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.7m and offshore winds, Meio da Baia might actually be rideable today; pity the tourists.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h SSE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 18.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 1.9m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With a 1.9m swell and onshore wind, today's session will offer some exercise in getting hammered by foamy closeouts.
🌊 Swell: 1.9m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h WSW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 31.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m
